metadata.title: USACE TM 5-822-12 methodology — end-to-end worked example (Fleet B composition)
sources: USACE TM 5-822-12 (1990), Figure 1 — CBR design curves
AASHTO (1993) Guide for Design of Pavement Structures — 4th power LEF
USACE EM 1110-3-141 (1987) — Pavement Design for Roads, Streets, and Open Storage Areas
notes: Fleet B composition: CAT 785D (40 trips/day) + Motor Grader (5 trips/day).
CESA derived from bench_01 Fleet B hand-calc (AASHTO 4th power law).
Coverages derived from bench_02 Fleet B hand-calc (USACE design coverages method).
Thickness interpolated from usace_cbr_v1 curve at CBR=7%, coverages=530357.24.
Fleet B coverages (530357.24) exceed the usace_cbr_v1 curve max (100000).
Per interpolate_thickness() specification, out-of-range coverages are clamped to
the upper boundary (100000). Thickness therefore equals the value at max coverages.
